title: OpenAI Proof of Concept Integration
description:
Establish a working connection to the OpenAI API using the project API key. The goal is a minimal proof of concept that successfully sends a prompt and receives a response, even with hardcoded prompt text.

A reference implementation using the Schema Generator Tool UI was provided as a starting point. The prompt structure mirrors what the migration blueprint will eventually supply — taking column names and data types as input and generating DDL output.

The POC validates the end-to-end API connectivity before integrating into the main application.
acceptance_criteria: Application successfully connects to OpenAI API with the configured API key
A hardcoded prompt is sent and a valid response is received
Connection errors are handled gracefully with meaningful error messages
middleware_changes: New server-side service to handle OpenAI API requests, including prompt construction and response parsing.
api_changes: Outbound API call to OpenAI completions endpoint with configurable API key authentication.
implementation_notes: Initial POC used the text-davinci-003 model. The schema generator tool at phpstack-908850-3154876.cloudwaysapps.com was used as the reference implementation.
